raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/scrub>XXXX there was a charge to my Citi card for {$74.00} and I immediately notified Citi of the charge. I was told to not worry, and that they ( Citi ) will take it off my account. Two days later, XX/XX/scrub>XXXX  another charge for {$59.00} was charged to my account. And again I called Citi and notified them, and again I was told to not worry, they will take it off my account. One month later, I was billed for the charges I had called them ( Citi ) about. And I was told I am responsible for those charges. Citi gave me the name of the company making the charges to my account ; XXXX XXXXXXXX XXXX. I explained to Citi that I do not know the company and I don't know how they got my card information, and I did not receive any package from XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXX. 

I ordered a XXXX XXXX from XXXX XXXX XXXX and it is suppose to a free gift from XXXX. When I was billed {$74.00}, I contacted XXXX, and they ( XXXX  ) said the email was not from them. I did receive the XXXX XXXX which I immediately return to sender without even opening to know the content. 

I have explained all these to Citi, I even wrote letters to Citi. They simply ignored all my letters and insist I pay for the fraudulent charges on my account. 

Please I need your help.
